title: cattleya × victoria-regina
intro: Cattleya × victoria-regina, also known as the Victoria Regina Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Cattleya genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × victoria-regina include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, and its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever reduction and skin conditions.
